summary: Frontend-only testing for startup loading screen feature. Verified LoadingScreen component renders correctly on fresh page load with app icon, TRUCKERS NAV title, By TUE subtitle, TUE circle spinner (double rings), status text cycling through 5 messages, and progress bar. Confirmed minimum 2800ms splash duration and smooth fade-out transition. App loads correctly to Dashboard after splash completes.
critical_code_review_comments: LoadingScreen.tsx is clean and well-structured at 242 lines. CSS keyframe animations injected via <style> tag work correctly.
App.tsx uses mountTimeRef + MIN_SPLASH_MS=2800 pattern correctly — Firebase auth resolving early still shows splash for full 2.8s.
Fade-out timing is correct: splashExiting=true triggers opacity-0 CSS transition, then setSplashVisible(false) 750ms later removes component.
Minor console warnings (chart width=-1, geolocation denied) are pre-existing and unrelated to loading screen feature.
context_for_next_testing_agent: App at http://localhost:8001 (single Vite SPA, port 8001). No auth required for testing. Loading screen (data-testid='loading-screen') shows on every fresh load for ≥2.8s then fades. App icon at /app-icon.png (1.2MB PNG). Dashboard renders after splash with COMMAND CENTER view. Geolocation denied errors are expected in test environment.

test_results.tue_circle_spinner: PASS - TUE label span found, double rings via CSS borders
test_results.minimum_2800ms_duration: PASS - still visible at 3.09s from nav start
test_results.smooth_fade_out: PASS - detached from DOM at 4.48s (splashExiting opacity-0 → unmount 750ms later)
test_results.app_loads_after_splash: PASS - Dashboard renders, no error elements found
test_results.css_keyframe_animations: PASS - splashIconIn, splashTitleIn, splashSpinnerIn, splashStatusIn, spin, spinReverse, iconGlow, pulseRing all injected via style tag
